# MLRecommender.SimilarityType.cosine

**Case**

The cosine similarity measure.

## Declaration

```swift
case cosine
```

## Discussion

Use cosine similarity for comparing item ratings.

## Similarity types

- **MLRecommender.SimilarityType.jaccard**: The Jaccard similarity measure.
- **MLRecommender.SimilarityType.pearson**: The Pearson correlation similarity measure.
title: MLRecommender.SimilarityType.cosine
